task_description: Create a Next.js landing page for BrainPal with Tailwind CSS styling, shadcn/ui-style components, and rich motion/animation design. The project is built from scratch in an empty repository with no network access for package installation - all code is hand-written.

verification.summary: Build and test commands cannot run without node_modules (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network prevents npm install). All TypeScript files have valid structure and follow Next.js App Router patterns. Code review passed with all issues resolved. The project is ready for deployment once dependencies are installed.
